attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.LINE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.UNIT_PRICE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.RECEIVING_FLAG, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.INACTIVE_DATE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.OUTSIDE_OPERATION_FLAG, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.RECEIVE_CLOSE_TOLERANCE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.PURCHASE_BASIS, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.MATCHING_BASIS, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B,
 (
 select LINE_TYPE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B
 minus
 select LINE_TYPE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LINE_TYPE_ID = STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.LINE_TYPE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_PO_LINE_TYPES_B)
